title: All branches in a conditional structure should not have exactly the same implementation
description: This rule checks if all branches in a conditional structure have the same implementation. It is a code smell as it might indicate a logic error or redundancy.
message: Identical implementation across multiple branches of a conditional structure.
recommendation: Review the logic and refactor the implementation to avoid redundancy.

noncompliant.description: Both branches have the same implementation.
All branches execute the same statement.

why_is_this_an_issue: Identical implementation across multiple branches of a conditional structure might indicate a logic error or redundancy.
how_to_fix: Review the logic and refactor the implementation to avoid redundancy.
